Package neqsim.process.equipment.capacity

Class EquipmentDesignData

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.capacity.EquipmentDesignData
public final class EquipmentDesignData extends Object
Applies equipment design capacity data from JSON input to process equipment.

This utility reads a designCapacities JSON object keyed by equipment name, sets design values (e.g., internal diameter, separator length, rated power, max duty) on the corresponding equipment if not already configured, and tags each capacity constraint's data source for traceability in utilization reports.

Supported equipment types and properties:

Design capacity properties by equipment type
Equipment JSON Properties
Separator / Scrubber internalDiameter [m], separatorLength [m], designGasLoadFactor [m/s]
Compressor maxSpeed [RPM], ratedPower [kW]
Heater / Cooler maxDesignDuty [W], maxDesignDutyKW [kW], maxDesignDutyMW [MW]
Pump maxDesignPower [kW], maxDesignVolumeFlow [m3/hr]

Example JSON: 

 {
   "designCapacities": {
     "HP Separator": {
       "internalDiameter": 2.0,
       "separatorLength": 6.0,
       "designGasLoadFactor": 0.08
     },
     "Export Compressor": {
       "ratedPower": 5000,
       "maxSpeed": 12000
     },
     "Gas Cooler": {
       "maxDesignDutyMW": 15.0
     }
   }
 }
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • EquipmentDesignData

      Private constructor for utility class.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public static Map<String,EquipmentDesignData.ApplyResult> apply(ProcessSystem process, com.google.gson.JsonObject designCapacities)
      Applies design capacity data from a JSON object to a process system's equipment.

      For each equipment name in the JSON, looks up the equipment in the process and applies the design properties. Properties are only set if they are not already configured on the equipment (i.e., still at default or zero values). After applying, tags the capacity constraints with the data source for utilization report traceability.

      Parameters:
      process - the process system containing the equipment
      designCapacities - JSON object keyed by equipment name, with property objects as values
      Returns:
      a report of applied changes, keyed by equipment name

    • tagConstraintDataSources

      public static void tagConstraintDataSources(ProcessSystem process, com.google.gson.JsonObject designCapacities)
      Tags capacity constraints on all equipment with their data source.

      Equipment that received design values from the JSON input gets tagged as "designCapacities". Equipment that already had values set gets tagged as "equipment". Equipment with no design data gets "not_set".

      Parameters:
      process - the process system
      designCapacities - the design capacities JSON (used to determine which equipment was configured)

    • applySeparatorDesign

      private static void applySeparatorDesign(Separator sep, com.google.gson.JsonObject props, EquipmentDesignData.ApplyResult result)
      Applies separator design capacity properties.
      Parameters:
      sep - the separator
      props - JSON properties
      result - the apply result to populate

    • findEquipment

      private static ProcessEquipmentInterface findEquipment(ProcessSystem process, String name)

      Parameters:

      name - the equipment name
      Returns:
